metadata.description: Maniax — Claude Code plugins collection. Ships: memory-system (project-local knowledge tooling: rules/init-memory/knowledge-updater + pre-commit gate), second-brain (brain2 vault + observation-driven memory pipeline: capture every turn → nightly dream digests → wiki), marketing-toolkit (8 marketing skills), learn-coursera (Coursera-to-skill meta-skill), tmux-team (multi-agent Scrum team scaffolding), po/dev/qc/cmo (role agents + skills).

plugins.name: memory-system
plugins.description: Project-local knowledge tooling: generate-rules, init-memory, knowledge-updater, reorganize, plus pre-commit-gate hook that blocks commits when knowledge is stale. All brain2 vault interaction lives in second-brain plugin instead.

plugins.name: marketing-toolkit
plugins.description: 8 marketing skills distilled from Google's Digital Marketing & E-commerce Professional Certificate: SEO audit, email campaign builder + metrics, social media calendar + listening, A/B test designer, AI prompt engineering (T-C-R-E-I), and GA4+Google Ads unified dashboard. Every skill bundles deterministic Python scripts + reference docs. Average benchmark: 93 percent pass rate vs 48 percent baseline.

plugins.name: learn-coursera
plugins.description: Meta-skill for turning Coursera courses into Claude Code skills. Discovers top professional courses on any topic, extracts video transcripts via Playwright, enriches them into actionable notes, scores skill-worthiness with a 5-criteria rubric, then builds + benchmarks new skills and packages them as plugins. Handles single courses and Professional Certificates. Triggers on English and Vietnamese prompts.

plugins.name: second-brain
plugins.description: All brain2 vault interactions + observation-driven memory pipeline. Skills: second-brain (mega: ingest/query/lint/note/brain-dump/kanban), memory-recall (read-only wiki/code-knowledge/), project-memory-recall (role-partitioned per-project query). Active store retired — replaced by Stop hook `observation_logger` that auto-appends every Claude turn to workspace observation.md (auto-creates if missing). Nightly dream skill (planned) digests observation.md → extracts insights to wiki/projects/<X>/memory/<role>.md → archives. 3 hooks: SessionStart inject, UserPromptSubmit reminder, Stop observation_logger. Vault path via SECOND_BRAIN_VAULT.

plugins.name: tmux-team
plugins.description: Multi-agent tmux team for Scrum-style projects. Default 3-role team (PO/DEV/QC). Each pane runs `claude --agent <role>`; board state lives as Obsidian Kanban markdown in docs/board/; SessionStart hook injects workflow + sprint + backlog. Successor to tmux-team-creator-md.

plugins.name: po
plugins.description: Product Owner toolkit — PO subagent, 4 core PO skills (story-writer, backlog-groomer, sprint-planner, stakeholder-bridge), and 7 Built For Mars UX research skills (60+ case studies). Project memory recall is delegated to /second-brain:project-memory-recall (with role=po) so the same generic skill serves all roles.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Developer toolkit (unified) — single DEV agent owning spec → TDD implementation → self-review → verification across any stack. Bundles karpathy-guidelines (behavioral guardrails) and vercel-react-best-practices (React/Next.js patterns); references /simplify for cleanup. Project memory delegated to /second-brain:project-memory-recall role=dev.

plugins.name: qc
plugins.description: Quality Control toolkit — black-box tester agent (independent of DEV) with 2 dedicated QC skills: qc-mobile-testing (Appium CLI) and qc-web-testing (Playwright CLI). Verifies acceptance criteria, hunts edge cases, files clear bug reports with severity, re-tests after fixes. Project memory delegated to /second-brain:project-memory-recall role=qc.

plugins.name: cmo
plugins.description: Chief Marketing Officer agent (Demand Architect & Brand Compounder). 1150-line strategic CMO persona with source-credibility taxonomy (Official/Tier1/Tier2/Estimate + freshness), triangulated TAM/SAM/SOM methodology, competitive intelligence, demand-gen ops, content/PR playbooks, battlecard ops. Hard financial boundary: marketing efficiency only, P&L needs CFO. No bundled skills yet. Project memory delegated to /second-brain:project-memory-recall role=cmo.
